name: tulle
description: A WebGL2 effects and compositing library — shader effect chains, layers, CSS-like layout, kinetic text, video clips with timeline cues, and deterministic WebM export. No GLSL to write, no build step, no dependencies.
author: Alan Siegler

scripts.test: node test/pool.test.mjs && node test/composite.test.mjs && node test/transform.test.mjs && node test/effect.test.mjs && node test/text.test.mjs && node test/clip.test.mjs && node test/layout.test.mjs && node test/animate.test.mjs && node test/export.test.mjs && node test/cube.test.mjs
